hooks.command: git diff origin/main...HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q release_notes.md || echo 'REMINDER: release_notes.md not updated — run /release-notes before this push reaches a PR'
git diff origin/main...HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q release_notes.md || echo 'REMINDER: release_notes.md not updated — run /release-notes to draft the notes for this PR'
git diff origin/main...HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -q release_notes.md || echo 'REMINDER: release_notes.md not updated — run /release-notes before opening the PR'
